Strategic Consulting

Great Teaching Needs
Great Systems Behind It

You don't have a talent problem. You have an infrastructure problem. I help schools, districts, and educators build the systems, tools, and strategies that make exceptional teaching sustainable.

What I Consult On

Deep Expertise, Delivered Practically

Literacy & Reading Systems

Design and implement structured literacy programs, reading intervention frameworks, and Science of Reading-aligned curriculum.

80% of students moved up a reading level in one semester

EdTech Integration

Strategic technology adoption for classrooms and schools. Tool selection, training, and sustainable integration that sticks.

Schools report 40% faster teacher technology adoption

AI-Powered Instruction

Help your team understand and implement AI tools for lesson planning, assessment, differentiation, and administrative workflows.

Educators save 5+ hours per week with AI workflows

Curriculum & Assessment Design

Custom curriculum development, assessment alignment, and instructional system design for schools, districts, and homeschool families.

100+ standards-aligned resources designed and delivered

Who I Work With

Find Your Path

Every engagement starts with understanding your specific context and goals.

Schools & Districts

System-level consulting for literacy programs, tech rollouts, and AI implementation.

Request a Proposal

Individual Educators

1-on-1 coaching for classroom strategy, tech integration, and professional growth.

Book a Call

Families & Homeschoolers

Personalized curriculum planning, learning assessments, and skill-gap support for your child.

Schedule a Session

How It Works

A Clear Path From Challenge to Solution

01

Discovery Call

Free 30-minute call to understand your challenges, goals, and timeline.

02

Needs Assessment

A structured audit of your current systems, tools, and instructional approach.

03

Strategy & Plan

Custom action plan with clear milestones, deliverables, and implementation steps.

04

Implementation & Support

Hands-on guidance through execution, with ongoing coaching and progress checks.

Real Results

What Clients Are Saying

“Michelle didn't just give us a plan — she gave us a system we could sustain. Our reading intervention program transformed outcomes for 80% of our struggling readers in one semester.”

See It In Action

From Strategy to Product: AssessAlign

AssessAlign is a real example of what my consulting practice produces — a tool I designed and built to solve an assessment alignment problem I saw repeatedly across schools and districts.

Live Project

AssessAlign

Intelligent assessment orchestration that helps educators and administrators map assessments to standards for truly data-driven instruction.

Gap Analysis

Report Generation
